summary: Iteration 19 - Certificate Template Editor Testing. Verified certificate preview endpoints, PDF generation, border styles, orientations, placeholder replacement, and coordinate system. All 29 backend tests passed.

minor.issue: Default template 'Classic Professional' (certtmpl_4049746dc2ae) has 0 elements in database
minor.impact: Certificate generation falls back to default generator instead of using template
minor.recommendation: Re-seed the Classic Professional template with elements or update it via the editor
minor.note: This is a data issue - the template was created before elements were properly saved

action_items: Fix data issue: Update 'Classic Professional' template (certtmpl_4049746dc2ae) to include elements, or re-seed preset templates
critical_code_review_comments: certificate_service.py: Coordinate system conversion is correctly implemented (y from top-based % to bottom-based ReportLab)
certificate_service.py: Text wrapping via wrap_text() function works correctly
certificate_service.py: Border styles (classic, modern, corporate, ornate) match frontend CSS definitions
certificate_service.py: include_footer parameter prevents duplicate certificate_id when template already has it
certificate_templates.py: Preview endpoints (GET and POST) correctly generate PDFs with sample/custom data
All 8 preset template definitions have correct element structures with {training_name} placeholder
context_for_next_testing_agent: Certificate template editor backend is fully functional. Test user (a2be3723-95b8-4f00-bf33-583d8b46463a) has completed training sessions. 8 preset templates exist but 'Classic Professional' has 0 elements (data issue). Other templates (Modern Minimal, Corporate Blue, etc.) have proper elements and render correctly.

template_preview.nonexistent_template_404: PASS - Preview of non-existent template returns 404

border_styles.classic: PASS - Classic border template renders correctly
border_styles.modern: PASS - Modern border template renders correctly
border_styles.corporate: PASS - Corporate border template renders correctly
border_styles.ornate: PASS - Ornate border template renders correctly

template_elements.text_elements: PASS - Templates with elements have text elements
template_elements.valid_coordinates: PASS - Element coordinates are valid percentages (0-100)

certificate_verification.verify_generated: PASS - Generated certificates can be verified

template_crud.get_specific: PASS - Get specific template by ID works
template_crud.create_delete: PASS - Create and delete template works

error_handling.nonexistent_user: PASS - Certificate for non-existent user returns 404

features_confirmed_working: Certificate template preview with custom placeholders (POST /api/certificate-templates/{id}/preview)
Coordinate system conversion (top-based % to bottom-based ReportLab)
Text wrapping for long text elements
Border styles: classic, modern, corporate, ornate
